description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of flat and sloped brown roofs, white exterior walls, and large glass windows. The structure is elongated, with a prominent main section and a smaller, attached wing, both unified by a continuous base platform. Skylights and clerestory windows are visible on the sloped roof, providing ample natural light to the interior. The facade includes a combination of large floor-to-ceiling windows and smaller, rectangular windows, creating an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. A partial exterior wall and a recessed entryway add privacy and architectural interest to the front. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, elongated house with white walls, brown sloped and flat roofs, and large glass windows, featuring a minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main facade with a partial exterior wall, large windows, and a sloped roof with skylights.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the smaller wing, clerestory windows, and the intersection of flat and sloped roof sections.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the house, extensive glass windows, and the main entryway area.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, emphasizing the rear section, skylights, and the geometric roof transitions.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a partial privacy wall, minimal steps, and large glass panels
